name: QA 1098
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1098

Exercise a couple of python PMDA module features.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1098

Exercise a couple of python PMDA module features.

Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce

Exercise a couple of python PMDA module features.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
